sagemaker.monitoringschedule.s3output.Lo.Description: The local path to the S3 storage location where SageMaker saves the results of a monitoring job. LocalPath is an absolute path for the output data.

sagemaker.monitoringschedule.s3output.S3.Description: Whether to upload the results of the monitoring job continuously or after the job completes.
A URI that identifies the S3 storage location where SageMaker saves the results of a monitoring job.
